user.title: Add Yamaha Soundbar
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Yamaha soundbar.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device. Check the IP address and make sure the soundbar is on.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed while contacting the soundbar.

join.name: Join
join.description: Group players together in a multiroom setup.

unjoin.name: Unjoin
unjoin.description: Unjoin a player or all players from the multiroom setup.

snapshot.name: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Save the current state to restore it later.

restore.name: Restore
restore.description: Restore the previous state from a snapshot.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: Recall a preset on the device.

command.name: Command
command.description: Execute a low-level command on the device.

play_track.name: Play track
play_track.description: Play a track by name from the local track list.

sound_settings.name: Sound settings
sound_settings.description: Apply one or more sound settings.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the soundbar.

invalid_auth.message: Authentication failed when contacting the soundbar.

unknown.message: Unexpected error while communicating with the soundbar.
